actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / derived rank-one bridge not closed on current PR230 surface
conditional_surface_status: If a future current-surface certificate supplies a primitive positivity-improving neutral scalar transfer sector with an isolated lowest pole plus canonical-Higgs/source overlap authority, the existing Perron/rank-one support theorem could bridge O_sp to the physical Higgs readout.

usable_support: fermion determinant positivity if the staggered+Wilson bridge is later accepted
determinant_or_reflection_positivity_bou.why_not_bridge: Positivity preservation is weaker than positivity improvement.  A block-diagonal positive neutral transfer keeps all source-only C_ss rows while preserving an orthogonal neutral scalar direction.

exact_next_action: Make the derived bridge positive by deriving one real current-surface neutral off-diagonal generator or primitive-cone certificate.  The certificate must define the neutral basis and transfer matrix, prove strong connectivity/positive primitive power, certify pole isolation, and supply source plus canonical-Higgs overlap authority.  Otherwise return to measured O_H/C_sH/C_HH or W/Z response rows.

positive_contract.needed: current PR230 Cl(3)/Z3 neutral scalar basis, including source and orthogonal sectors
same-surface neutral transfer matrix with nonnegative entries on a certified cone
directed positive-entry graph strongly connected and some finite transfer power strictly positive
nondegenerate lowest isolated neutral scalar pole with FV/IR/threshold controls
O_sp/source pole overlaps the unique neutral pole with nonzero residue
canonical O_H exists on the same surface or is bypassed by a theorem that all neutral scalar probes couple to the unique pole
no surviving orthogonal neutral top-coupled direction after rank-one theorem
reject H_unit/Ward, observed targets, alpha_LM/plaquette/u0, and unit-overlap shortcuts

proposal_allowed_reason: The current surface has conditional rank-one support and a clear primitive-cone contract, but no strict primitive-cone certificate, no neutral off-diagonal generator, no irreducibility theorem, no canonical O_H certificate, and no C_sH/C_HH rows.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not identify O_sp with O_H
does not treat positivity preservation, reflection positivity, or determinant positivity as positivity improvement
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, R_conn, or unit-overlap shortcuts
does not treat synthetic primitive matrices as PR230 evidence
